title: Passion Bitter Treat
description: A chewy and bitter treat perfect for a sick day, this vegan-friendly dessert features passion fruit pulp infused with sous-vide.

ingredients.name: Coconut Milk
ingredients.notes: Vegan or non-vegan depending on your preference

instructions: Squeeze passion fruits to extract pulp, removing seeds and membranes.
Combine coconut milk with extracted passion fruit pulp in a blender, add honey if using for sweetness, then blend until smooth and creamy.
Add agar agar and simmer the mixture over low heat until it thickens. Stir frequently to prevent burning.
Pour the mixture into a mold or small ramekins and let it set in the refrigerator for at least 4 hours or overnight.
Serve chilled with additional honey or vegan yogurt as desired.
